packageRules.description: Disable the built-in gradle-wrapper manager; we manage all three wrapper.properties files via the customManager below so distributionUrl and distributionSha256Sum stay in lockstep. The built-in manager only refreshed the sha in one of the three files (see PR for renovate/main-gradle-wrapper-9.5.x).
Gradle wrapper (custom-managed): one rolling PR per release train (e.g. 9.5.x patch lane and 9.6.x minor/RC lane), lockstep across all wrapper.properties files; manual fix commits preserved

customManagers.description: Update distributionUrl and distributionSha256Sum together in every gradle-wrapper.properties file. Uses the gradle-version datasource which exposes the official SHA-256 as currentDigest, so all three properties files (root, build-tools-internal, plugins/examples) are updated in lockstep within a single PR.
